ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to the team's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Whether the game was played at home or away */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee or official who oversaw the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ats_records" (
  "ats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ATS record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the record belongs to */,
  "record" TEXT /* ATS record (e.g., 9-6-0) */,
  "cover_percentage" REAL /* Cover percentage for the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* The season during which the ATS record was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the ATS record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ats_records_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mov" (
  "mov_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MOV record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the record belongs to */,
  "mov" REAL /* MOV for the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* The season during which the MOV was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the MOV record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mov_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mov_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ats_plus_minus" (
  "ats_plus_minus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ATS +/- record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the record belongs to */,
  "ats_plus_minus" REAL /* ATS +/- for the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* The season during which the ATS +/- was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the ATS +/- record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ats_plus_minus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ats_plus_minus_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the team */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used to access the data */,
  "device" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
